sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-06-26 17:50
- Distance: 7.2 km
- Moving time: 39:05
- Elapsed time: 39:09
- Elevation gain: 42.2 m
- Average heart rate: 163.5 bpm
- Max heart rate: 175 bpm
- Average watts: 211.4 W
- Average speed: 11.1 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `4` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `166.8 bpm`, ranging from `155.8` to `171.8 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `162.1 bpm` and second-half average HR was `171.4 bpm` (+9.3 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `162.6 spm`, with a working range of `106.2` to `173.5 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `170.2 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `155.0 spm` (-15.2 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:24 /km` across `7.244 km` in `39:05` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:19 /km` and second-half pace was `5:28 /km` (+9 s/km), so pace eased a little late.

- Strava summary HR came in at `163.5 bpm` average and `175 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `158.1 bpm` in the first half and `169.0 bpm` in the second (+11.0 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `39:05` out of `39:09` elapsed (99.8%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `6` stop segments and `0.6%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `65.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `4.4 m` and `16.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `32.2 m` in the first half and `33.0 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
